titleStmt.title: SII 24.498: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 498. (A.R. No. 351 of 1953-54.) SHRINE OF THE GODDESS RAṄGANĀYAKĪ, TIERS OF THE SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of the income of 17 rēkhai-poṉ on 12 shares of the village Koṇḍaṅgi alias Eṟan-Timmarājapuram situated in Śōḻamaṇḍalachchīrmai and forming the Western division of Pullūrpaṟṟu in Tiruvārūrchchchāvaḍi as poliyūṭṭu by Ammaiyaṅgār, the younger sister of Śrīraṅgāchāryār, son of Bhāvanāchāryār and grandson of Kandāḍai Nāyanāchāryar for services and offerings of curd-rice on the occasions of the natal stars of the Āḻvārs, Śūḍikkoḍutta-Nāchchiyār and Āḷavandār. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1499, Īśvara, Tulā ba. 7, Friday, Punarvasu regularly correspond to 1577 A.D., October 4, Friday, ·17; ·63.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājarāja is written below the line. parameśvaran śrīvirapradāpa śrīvīra śrīraṅgaya devamahārāyar prithivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 9 10 9 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa Īśvarasam vatsarattu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu saptamiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa punarvvasunakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiya kulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu viḻā vaṟāvitivaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅgam tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrībhaṇṭārattukku vādhūlagotrattu
Āpastambhasūtrattu yajuśśākhādhyāyarāna kantāṭai nāyanācāryyar pautrar bhāvanācāryyar putrar śrīraṅgācāryyart tiruttaṅkaiyār Āṉa Amma yaṅkāreṉ teṇṭaṉ samarppittu poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Aṭiyeṉ Uṭaya Ubhayamāka Āḻvārkaḷ Āṭṭait tirunakṣatraṅkaḷukku nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār koyilile Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikaikkup poli yūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷaikku tiruviḷaiāṭṭamāka cetta coḻamaṇṭala cīrmaiyil tiruk kāverikku
teṉkarai tiruvārūrc cāvaṭi pullūrpaṟṟu mel kūṟṟu koṇṭaṅki Āṉa Ēṟan timma rājapurattil cantirakiri Eṟantimmarājar samarppitta bhāgam 10 2- kku varumagra hārārāmakṣetrasakalasamudāyaprāptiyum Uḷpaṭa Irekaippaṭi ḷa 10 7kkum poliyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷai Āḻvārkaḷ Āṭṭaittirunakṣatram 10 2-kkuttirunakṣatram Oṉṟukku nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār koyilile Eḻuntaruḷukaiyil Amutucey taruḷum kūrukku vilaippaṭi poṉ 1u 2(1/2) Ākattirunakṣatram 10 2kku Uasavābharaṇam cūṭi
kuṭutta nācciyār Āṭṭait tirunakṣatram tiruvāṭippūrattukku śrīraṅganāyakiyār Amutu ceytaruḷi cūṭik kuṭutta nācciyār caṉṉatiyile śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷukku cela vaḻikkum tettiotaṉaFor daddhyodana 9 10 4kku ḷa 1¥ ṉātamuni Āḻvār koyilile śrī Āḷavan tār Āṭṭait tirunakṣatram tiruvāṭi Uttirāṭattukku nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār Amutu ceytaruḷi ṉātamuṉi Āḻvār caṉṉatiyile jiyāḷ śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷukku celavu tetti Otaṉam 9 10 4kku ḷa 1- Āka ḷa 10 7 Inta poṉ
patineḻukkum varuṣam varuṣam toṟum Amutu ceytaruḷi caṉṉitiyile jiyāḷ śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷukku viniyogamākak kaṭavatākavum Inta poṉ patineḻukkum Inta poliyūṭṭukkaṭṭaḷai Inta grāmattil paṅkil Utaiyaṅkoṇṭe candrādityavarai yum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum Inta poliyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷai taḷikai Uṇṭāṉatum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu Uḷpaṭa caṉṉatiyile jiyyāḷ śrīvayiṣṇavarkku viṉiyogamākak kaṭavatāka vum § dānapālanayormmaddhye dānāt śreyonu pālanam . dānāt svargamavā
pnoti pālanādaccutam padam . Ippaṭikku Intappoliyūṭṭu ccilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu . śubhamastu §
Digital edition of SII 24.498 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
